sections.paragraph: m. (from the root לָקַשׁ) the latter (i.e. the spring) rain, which falls in Palestine in the months of March and April, before the harvest. Deu 11:14 Jer 3:3 5:24 opp. to the former or autumnal rain (יֹורֶה, מֹורֶה). Poet. an eloquent and profitable discourse is compared to the latter rain Job 29:23.
